name: TieredMenu
description: TieredMenu displays submenus in nested overlays.

props.name: popup
props.description: Defines if menu would displayed as a popup.

props.name: breakpoint
props.description: The breakpoint to define the maximum width boundary.

props.name: appendTo
props.description: A valid query selector or an HTMLElement to specify where the overlay gets attached.

props.name: baseZIndex
props.description: Base zIndex value to use in layering.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When present, it specifies that the component should be disabled.

props.name: tabindex
props.description: Index of the element in tabbing order.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Defines a string value that labels an interactive element.

props.name: ariaLabelledby
props.description: Identifier of the underlying menu element.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

events.name: focus
events.description: Callback to invoke when the component receives focus.

events.name: blur
events.description: Callback to invoke when the component loses focus.

events.name: before-show
events.description: Callback to invoke before the popup is shown.

events.name: before-hide
events.description: Callback to invoke before the popup is hidden.

events.name: show
events.description: Callback to invoke when the popup is shown.

events.name: hide
events.description: Callback to invoke when the popup is hidden.

slots.name: item
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Menuitem instance */ item: MenuItem; /** * Label property of the menuitem */ label: string | ((...args: any) => string) | undefined; /** * Binding properties of the menuitem */ props: TieredMenuRouterBindProps; /** * Whether or not there is a submenu */ hasSubmenu: boolean; }): VNode[]

slots.name: submenuicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Whether item is active */ active: boolean; }): VNode[]

slots.name: itemicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Menuitem instance */ item: MenuItem; /** * Style class of the item icon element. */ class: any; }): VNode[]
